name: vercel-react-native-skills
description: React Native and Expo best practices for building performant mobile apps. Use
capabilities: Apply list performance optimizations including virtualization with FlashList and item memoization
Implement animations correctly using Reanimated with GPU-friendly properties
Use native navigation components over JavaScript-based navigators
Optimize UI patterns with Pressable, native modals, and safe area handling
Structure React Native monorepos with proper native dependency management
Follow React Compiler requirements for function handling and shared values
author: vercel-labs
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill containing React Native best practices. All static findings are false positives triggered by code examples in markdown files. No executable code present.
valueStatement: Building performant React Native apps requires following platform-specific patterns for lists, animations, and state management. This skill provides 35+ AI agent rules for optimized mobile development.
limitations: Does not execute code or modify files directly
Provides guidance only - user must implement changes
Focused on React Native and Expo - not general React or web development
Rules reflect current best practices and may change with framework updates

useCases.title: Optimize List Performance in React Native Apps
useCases.description: When building feeds, timelines, or any scrollable list with many items, apply virtualization and memoization rules to prevent janky scrolling.

useCases.targetUser: UI/UX developers creating interactive mobile experiences
useCases.title: Implement Smooth Animations with Reanimated
useCases.description: When adding gestures or animations, use GPU-friendly properties and the correct Reanimated hooks to maintain 60fps performance.

useCases.targetUser: Full-stack engineers managing complex mobile projects
useCases.title: Structure React Native Monorepos
useCases.description: When setting up monorepo projects with Expo or React Native, follow native dependency and version management rules to avoid build issues.

promptTemplates.title: Beginner - List Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: I am building a React Native app with a scrollable list. Help me understand the best practices for list performance including virtualization, memoization, and avoiding inline objects in list items.
promptTemplates.scenario: Learning React Native list optimization fundamentals

promptTemplates.title: Intermediate - Animation Implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to implement a swipe-to-dismiss gesture with React Native Reanimated. What rules should I follow to ensure smooth 60fps animations and proper gesture handling?

promptTemplates.title: Advanced - Native Navigation Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: My Expo Router app has performance issues during navigation transitions. What are the rules for using native stack navigators versus JS-based navigators?
promptTemplates.scenario: Optimizing navigation performance in production apps

promptTemplates.title: Expert - React Compiler Compatibility
promptTemplates.prompt: I am enabling the React Compiler in my React Native app. What rules do I need to follow for function destructuring and shared value handling to ensure my code compiles correctly?
promptTemplates.scenario: Preparing code for React Compiler optimization

bestPractices: Prioritize list performance rules first - scrolling smoothness is critical for mobile UX
Use native navigation components (native stack, native tabs) for production apps
Apply memoization early rather than debugging performance issues later
antiPatterns: Avoid inline style objects in list items - define them outside render
Do not use && for conditional rendering with potentially falsy values
Avoid calling measure() on views - use onLayout callback instead

faq.question: Does this skill modify my code directly?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides rules and guidance for AI agents to follow. The actual code modifications are performed by the AI agent based on these guidelines.

faq.question: How many rules are included in this skill?
faq.answer: The skill contains 35+ rules across 13 categories, prioritized from critical (list performance) to low impact (font configuration).

faq.question: Are these rules specific to Expo?
faq.answer: Most rules apply to both Expo and bare React Native projects. Some rules like font config plugins are Expo-specific.

faq.question: How should I prioritize applying these rules?
faq.answer: Start with list performance and animation rules, as these directly impact user experience. Navigation and UI pattern rules are next, followed by state management and rendering optimizations.

faq.question: Do these rules work with React Native New Architecture?
faq.answer: Yes. The rules are designed to be compatible with both the classic and new architecture. Some optimizations may have different performance characteristics.

faq.question: How often are these rules updated?
faq.answer: Rules are maintained by Vercel and updated as React Native, Expo, and related libraries evolve. Check the GitHub repository for the latest version.
